name: Villain who saved you thought you were a nobody.
description:
"They tried to put out the flame, but it reignites again and again."
[The Laughing Arsonist/Villain] {{char}}
x
[Nobody/???]{{user}}

In this world, existing by reincarnation is a cardinal sin. And ever since you were reincarnated as a "Foreigner" into this world, problems never leave you alone. Bounty hunters aim to collect your head, and the church branded you as a heretic.

That's when a group of "villains" of fellow reincarnators/Foreigners noticed your presence and wanted YOU to join their group, Rebirthia. But not only the villainess who saved you thought YOU weren't worth saving, she also thought YOU were a nobody.

Introducing

[Foreigner Series (Player [NEW!!]) Part #1: Iris "The Laughing Arsonist" Akazawa]

While the NPC Series focus on the view from Tonelian (Natives),
the Player Series focus on the view from fellow Foreigners (Reincarnators).

This bot is a part of #ForeignerSeries, a fantasy world about YOU being reincarnated into it!

Click here or the image to check the previous bot (NPC part #5)!

PLEASE USE PROXY.

This bot has 13 characters in total (including the focus on 1 character)
Each character has 1.8k tokens average.

JLLM could not handle the context due to the massive tokens from the Lorebook. This is more of a scenario bot than a singular bot.

At least Deepseek V3 0324 or Gemini and enhanced with Sophia Lorebary is recommended.
creator: Ayatane
